WARNING: These test points are for A2779_S (820-02841, X2523/MLB_S) ONLY. The C/CTO/Max variant (820-02655) has different component designators. Do NOT use these on the C variant. Component designators are board-specific — the same rail appears at DIFFERENT components on other boards.
description: Decision trees for 5V DCPS scenarios. Board connected via USB-C at 5V (pre-PD negotiation). Adapted from A2681 diagnostic workflow but with M2 Pro-specific power architecture (Austringer VR, 3 CLVR instances, 3 USB-C ports).
data_source: Adapted from A2681 Safan diagnostic patterns. No A2779_S-specific repair data yet — patterns are analogous but component designators WILL differ.

scenarios.meaning: Board draws nothing. CD3217 is not loading VBUS. Fault at input stage.

steps.measure: Visual inspection of all 3 USB-C connectors (left x2, right x1)
steps.expected: Clean pins, no bent/missing contacts, no liquid residue
steps.if_wrong: Replace USB-C connector flex or clean connector

steps.measure: Probe PPVBUS_USBC0 decoupling cap (left upper port, page 74)
steps.if_wrong: DCPS cable fault or connector open circuit. Try other ports.

steps.action: Check CD3217 (UF400) for signs of life
steps.measure: Diode mode on UF400 VDD pins
steps.if_wrong: UF400 short → replace CD3217. Check SPI ROM for short.

steps.measure: Move DCPS to each port in turn, probe VBUS decoupling
steps.expected: At least one port shows 5V and current draw
steps.if_wrong: All ports dead → connector flex, widespread liquid damage, or all 3 CD3217s dead
steps.if_ok: Fault isolated to specific port CD3217

scenarios.meaning: CD3217 is drawing some current but board not progressing. PPBUS_AON likely not coming up or PP3V8_AON missing.

steps.measure: Probe PPBUS_AON decoupling cap
steps.expected: 12V (battery voltage) or rising toward ~5V (adapter only, pre-PD)
steps.if_missing: Fault in charging circuit. Go to step 2.

steps.measure: Diode mode on PPBUS_AON
steps.if_wrong: PPBUS_AON shorted. Isolate and trace downstream.
steps.next_if_ok: Check charger IC (page 29), SYS_DETECT circuit (J5150/U5150 BLKAMPMHY CRITICAL).

steps.measure: Probe PP3V8_AON decoupling cap
steps.if_missing: Fault in U5700 (SVR AON, 30A, 3-phase). Check PPVAON_PWR_EN from J5150. Check 3V8 VR enable delay circuit (page 30).

steps.action: Check PP3V8_AON for short on VDDMAIN branch
steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN distribution caps
steps.if_wrong: PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN shorted — common fault. Thermal cam to find hot component.

steps.measure: Probe PP5V_S2 output from UC259
steps.if_missing: UC259 fault or P5V2TPS_PWR_EN not asserted.

steps.measure: Probe PP1V8_AON_MPMU, PP1V2_AON_MPMU, PP3V_AON caps
steps.if_all_present: Fault downstream — check Austringer (U9300) and CLVR outputs

steps.measure: Apply thermal cam to the rail that is missing/shorted
steps.if_not_found: U8100 (MPMU) or U7700 (SPMU) likely dead → replace.

scenarios.meaning: Board drawing moderate current at 5V. Charger circuit partially working. PP3V8_AON likely present but something downstream loading it.

steps.measure: Probe PPBUS_AON
steps.if_missing: Charger path fault. See trickle tree.

steps.measure: Probe PP3V8_AON
steps.if_missing: U5700 fault. Check PPVAON_PWR_EN and PPVAON_FAULT_L.

steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V8_AON branches (VDDMAIN, SPMU_ISNS, WLBT)
steps.if_wrong: Identify shorted branch. Thermal cam that area.

steps.measure: Probe PP5V_S2 and PP3V3_S2 caps

scenarios.range: 0.2–0.5A (significant current, boot stalled or shorted rail)
scenarios.meaning: Board drawing significant current at 5V. Either boot attempt stalling or downstream rail short.

steps.action: Is the board trying to boot? Check for signs of life.
steps.measure: Look for fan spin, keyboard backlight, display backlight flash, chime
steps.if_signs: Board booting at 5V but not completing PD. Check CD3217 SPI ROM. Try 20V DCPS.

steps.measure: PPBUS_AON → PP3V8_AON → PP5V_S2 → MPMU LDOs → SPMU LDOs
steps.if_all_present: Check Austringer (U9300) and CLVR outputs. Go to step 3.
steps.if_any_missing: Fault at missing rail. See trickle tree.

steps.action: Check for PP3V3 or PP3V3_UPC LDO shorts
steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V3 lines and PP3V3_UPC0/1/2_LDO lines
steps.if_wrong: PP3V3 rail shorted — possibly CD3217 internal LDO fault.

steps.action: Connect to 20V DCPS and check transition
steps.measure: Switch DCPS to 20V, observe current
steps.if_normal_boot: Board boots at 20V — CD3217 PD negotiation issue. Replace SPI ROM or CD3217.
steps.if_same_current: Genuine short. Thermal cam all power domains.

scenarios.range: 0.5A+ (high current at 5V — major short or boot attempt)
scenarios.meaning: Very high current at 5V. Serious short on a high-current rail or boot attempt.

steps.note: High current at 5V with battery can cause heating.

steps.measure: Diode mode on PPBUS_AON
steps.if_wrong: PPBUS_AON dead short. Thermal cam immediately.

steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V8_AON and VDDMAIN caps
steps.if_wrong: PP3V8_AON dead short. U5700 pulling max current. Thermal cam.

steps.action: Check if board is actually booting
steps.measure: Switch to 20V DCPS
steps.if_boots: Normal — board was trying to boot at 5V.
steps.if_same_high_current: Genuine short. Systematic thermal cam sweep.
